name: sirreal/live-sandbox-editor
description: Development tooling for the Live Sandbox Editor WordPress plugin.

scripts-descriptions.install-plugin-vendor: Install the live-sandbox-editor plugin's runtime dependencies. The plugin's own composer post-install hook then runs tools/strauss.sh (downloading the pinned Strauss phar to .bin/ on demand) to generate the prefixed live-sandbox-editor/vendor-prefixed/. Runs automatically after every composer install/update at the repo root.
scripts-descriptions.lint:src: Run phpcs against src/ only (the Playground-bundled PHP library). Mirrors the CI step; leaves plugin code untouched.
